text.title: GitHub Copilot Workspace Four-Gate Pipeline Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the tracker-github-copilot-workspace methodology end-to-end. Decision-gates surface stops when inputs do not pass.

step.name: open-workspace
step.action: Open the issue in Copilot Workspace; spec gate fires automatically.

step.name: edit-spec
step.action: Human edits spec to fix AC ambiguity, scope; commit edits.
step.decision-gate: If spec cannot be fixed in Workspace, abort and rewrite issue.

step.name: edit-plan
step.action: Plan gate fires; human edits file-level plan to fix scope.

step.name: review-diff
step.action: Diff gate fires; human edits diff inline; commit.

step.name: open-pr
step.action: PR gate opens the PR; auto-comment with snapshot link attached.
